testcases.description: Verify if user able to launch the URL
testcases.raw: TC_01 External CummalationUI and FunctionalityVerify if user able to launch the URL Launch the Studio URL "https://qapartnerportal.kitaboo. com/reader/CL-ELA-master/#/login"Studio Listing page should display

testcases.description: Verify if user ia able to create math activity
testcases.expected: Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen
testcases.raw: TC_02 External Cummalation FunctionalityVerify if user ia able to create math activity 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info Activity creation page should display with Basic info screen

testcases.description: Verify if user is able to start authoring
testcases.expected: Click on start authoring Should redirect to New Activity creation page
testcases.raw: TC_03 External Cummalation FunctionalityVerify if user is able to start authoring 1. Launch the URL and Login with valid credentials 2.Click on "create new" 3.Click on math 4. Create activity by entering basic info 5. Click on start authoring Should redirect to New Activity creation page

testcases.expected: Add new stepAdd new step should be clickable

testcases.expected: Enter the Step Title User Should able to Enter Data in Step Title

testcases.description: Verify author can open an existing activity to add a step from another activity
testcases.expected: Open an activity with at least 1 existing step Activity opens with all steps visible in step list
testcases.raw: TC_10 External CummalationPositive Verify author can open an existing activity to add a step from another activity 1. Login as Author 2. Navigate to “My Activities” 3. Open an activity with at least 1 existing step Activity opens with all steps visible in step list

testcases.description: Verify “import” button is visible in the activity editor
testcases.expected: Look for the “import” button in the toolbar“import” button is visible and enabled
testcases.raw: TC_11 External CummalationPositive Verify “import” button is visible in the activity editor 1. Open an activity 2. Look for the “import” button in the toolbar“import” button is visible and enabled

testcases.description: Verify clicking “import” opens the step library1. Click “import”
testcases.expected: Observe modal or panel opens Step library opens with search options visible
testcases.raw: TC_12 External CummalationPositive Verify clicking “import” opens the step library1. Click “import” 2. Observe modal or panel opens Step library opens with search options visible

testcases.description: Verify current activity appears in step library list1. Check for current activity in list Current activity title and created date displayed correctly
testcases.expected: Check for current activity in list Current activity title and created date displayed correctly
testcases.raw: TC_13 External CummalationPositive Verify current activity appears in step library list1. Check for current activity in list Current activity title and created date displayed correctly

testcases.description: Verify author can search for a different activity by exact title
testcases.expected: SearchMatching activity appears in results
testcases.raw: TC_14 External CummalationPositive Verify author can search for a different activity by exact title 1. In step library search, enter full title of another activity 2. SearchMatching activity appears in results

testcases.description: Verify author can search for a different activity by partial title1.
testcases.expected: Search All activities matching keyword displayed
testcases.raw: TC_15 External CummalationPositive Verify author can search for a different activity by partial title1. Enter partial name of another activity 2. Search All activities matching keyword displayed

testcases.description: Verify search results display correct metadata for each activity1. Search for activities
testcases.expected: Observe results Title, created date, and owner displayed correctly
testcases.raw: TC_16 External CummalationPositive Verify search results display correct metadata for each activity1. Search for activities 2. Observe results Title, created date, and owner displayed correctly

testcases.description: Verify author can view steps from another activity1.
testcases.expected: View its step list All steps for that activity displayed in correct order
testcases.raw: TC_17 External CummalationPositive Verify author can view steps from another activity1. Select a different activity from results 2. View its step list All steps for that activity displayed in correct order

testcases.description: Verify author can select and import a step from another activity1.
testcases.expected: Click “Import” Step is copied into current activity as step (n+1)
testcases.raw: TC_18 External CummalationPositive Verify author can select and import a step from another activity1. Select step from external activity 2. Click “Import” Step is copied into current activity as step (n+1)

testcases.description: Verify imported step retains all original content1. Compare source and imported step All text, images, formatting, widgets match exactly
testcases.expected: Compare source and imported step All text, images, formatting, widgets match exactly
testcases.raw: TC_19 External CummalationPositive Verify imported step retains all original content1. Compare source and imported step All text, images, formatting, widgets match exactly

testcases.description: Verify imported step retains formatting1. Compare formatting between both steps Font, bullet styles, numbering, and line breaks are preserved
testcases.expected: Compare formatting between both steps Font, bullet styles, numbering, and line breaks are preserved
testcases.raw: TC_20 External CummalationPositiveVerify imported step retains formatting1. Compare formatting between both steps Font, bullet styles, numbering, and line breaks are preserved

testcases.description: Verify imported step metadata is editable1. Edit title, tags, scoring options
testcases.expected: SaveChanges apply to imported step only
testcases.raw: TC_21 External CummalationPositiveVerify imported step metadata is editable1. Edit title, tags, scoring options 2. SaveChanges apply to imported step only

testcases.description: Verify user can edit content of imported step1. Open imported step
testcases.expected: SaveChanges are saved successfully
testcases.raw: TC_22 External CummalationPositive Verify user can edit content of imported step1. Open imported step 2. Edit content 3. SaveChanges are saved successfully

testcases.description: Verify user can save and preview imported step1. Click “Save”
testcases.expected: Click “Preview” Step displays in preview mode exactly as in editor
testcases.raw: TC_23 External CummalationPositive Verify user can save and preview imported step1. Click “Save” 2. Click “Preview” Step displays in preview mode exactly as in editor

testcases.description: Verify imported step appears in correct order in navigation1. View step sequence Imported step placed immediately after current step or at end (as per design)
testcases.expected: View step sequence Imported step placed immediately after current step or at end (as per design)
testcases.raw: TC_24 External CummalationPositive Verify imported step appears in correct order in navigation1. View step sequence Imported step placed immediately after current step or at end (as per design)

testcases.description: Verify undo/cancel import action works1. Start importing step
testcases.expected: Click “Cancel”No step is added
testcases.raw: TC_25 External CummalationPositiveVerify undo/cancel import action works1. Start importing step 2. Click “Cancel”No step is added

testcases.description: Verify importing is blocked when no step is selected1. Try importing without selecting stepError: “Please select a step to import”
testcases.expected: Try importing without selecting stepError: “Please select a step to import”
testcases.raw: TC_26 External CummalationNegative Verify importing is blocked when no step is selected1. Try importing without selecting stepError: “Please select a step to import”

testcases.description: Verify importing is blocked when user lacks permission1. Login as read-only user
testcases.expected: Try importing stepError: “Permission denied”
testcases.raw: TC_27 External CummalationNegative Verify importing is blocked when user lacks permission1. Login as read-only user 2. Try importing stepError: “Permission denied”

testcases.description: Verify import works for all content types (text, images, videos, widgets)1. Import steps with various content typesAll types appear intact
testcases.expected: Import steps with various content typesAll types appear intact
testcases.raw: TC_28 External CummalationPositive Verify import works for all content types (text, images, videos, widgets)1. Import steps with various content typesAll types appear intact

testcases.description: Verify imported step with drag-and-drop widget functions in preview1. Import drag/drop step
testcases.expected: PreviewWidget behaves correctly
testcases.raw: TC_29 External CummalationPositive Verify imported step with drag-and-drop widget functions in preview1. Import drag/drop step 2. PreviewWidget behaves correctly

testcases.description: Verify system handles import of very large step1. Import large step with many elements Step is imported without performance issues
testcases.expected: Import large step with many elements Step is imported without performance issues
testcases.raw: TC_30 External CummalationPositive Verify system handles import of very large step1. Import large step with many elements Step is imported without performance issues

testcases.description: Verify importing a step with broken/unsupported media shows warning1. Import such step Warning displayed, step imported excluding broken media
testcases.expected: Import such step Warning displayed, step imported excluding broken media
testcases.raw: TC_31 External CummalationNegative Verify importing a step with broken/unsupported media shows warning1. Import such step Warning displayed, step imported excluding broken media

testcases.description: Verify multiple imports from same external activity are allowed1. Import same step multiple times Each import creates a new independent step
testcases.expected: Import same step multiple times Each import creates a new independent step
testcases.raw: TC_32 External CummalationPositive Verify multiple imports from same external activity are allowed1. Import same step multiple times Each import creates a new independent step

testcases.description: Verify user can publish activity containing imported step1. Import step
testcases.expected: Publish activity Published activity contains imported step
testcases.raw: TC_33 External CummalationPositive Verify user can publish activity containing imported step1. Import step 2. Publish activity Published activity contains imported step

testcases.description: Verify republishing after editing imported step updates reader view1. Edit imported step
testcases.expected: View in readerReader displays updated version
testcases.raw: TC_34 External CummalationPositive Verify republishing after editing imported step updates reader view1. Edit imported step 2. Republish 3. View in readerReader displays updated version

testcases.description: Verify imported step does not affect original activity
testcases.expected: Open source activityNo changes in source activity’s step
testcases.raw: TC_35 External CummalationPositive Verify imported step does not affect original activity 1. Edit imported step in current activity 2. Open source activityNo changes in source activity’s step

testcases.description: Verify search filters work correctly (date range, owner, tags)1. Apply filters in step library
testcases.expected: Observe results Only activities matching filters are shown
testcases.raw: TC_36 External CummalationPositive Verify search filters work correctly (date range, owner, tags)1. Apply filters in step library 2. Observe results Only activities matching filters are shown

testcases.description: Verify importing step from deleted external activity is not possible1. Search for deleted activity
testcases.expected: Try importingActivity not found, import unavailable
testcases.raw: TC_37 External CummalationNegative Verify importing step from deleted external activity is not possible1. Search for deleted activity 2. Try importingActivity not found, import unavailable

testcases.description: Verify external cumulation from 6.3 to 6.5 Launch 6.3 →
testcases.raw: TC_38 External CummalationPositiveVerify external cumulation from 6.3 to 6.5 Launch 6.3 → Enter data → Submit → Launch 6.5 → Check cumulated dataData from 6.3 appears correctly in 6.5

testcases.description: Verify external cumulation from 6.5 to 6.3 Launch 6.5 →
testcases.raw: TC_39 External CummalationPositiveVerify external cumulation from 6.5 to 6.3 Launch 6.5 → Enter data → Submit → Launch 6.3 → Check cumulated dataData from 6.5 appears correctly in 6.3

testcases.description: External cumulation not triggered due to SCORM API failureLaunch 6.3 → Disconnect SCORM → Submit → Launch 6.5 Cumulation fails; “SCORM API failed” popup appears
testcases.expected: 5 Cumulation fails; “SCORM API failed” popup appears
testcases.raw: TC_40 External CummalationNegative External cumulation not triggered due to SCORM API failureLaunch 6.3 → Disconnect SCORM → Submit → Launch 6.5 Cumulation fails; “SCORM API failed” popup appears

testcases.description: External CummalationEdge Reverse external cumulation from child to parent
testcases.expected: 3 unless designed
testcases.raw: TC_41 External CummalationEdge Reverse external cumulation from child to parent Enter data in 6.5 → Submit → Launch 6.3 → Check for unexpected cumulated data Data from 6.5 should not appear in 6.3 unless designed

testcases.description: Verify external cumulation works for first attempt
testcases.expected: 5 correctly
testcases.raw: TC_42 External CummalationPositive Verify external cumulation works for first attempt 1. Launch Activity 6.3 and enter data 2. Complete activity 3. Launch Activity 6.5Data from 6.3 appears in 6.5 correctly

testcases.description: Verify data patch before submit (first attempt)
testcases.raw: TC_43 External CummalationPositive Verify data patch before submit (first attempt) 1. Launch Activity 6.3 2. Enter data in step 3. Launch Activity 6.5 before submitting 6.3Partially entered data visible in 6.5

testcases.description: Verify data patch after submit (first attempt)1. Submit Activity 6.3
testcases.raw: TC_44 External CummalationPositiveVerify data patch after submit (first attempt)1. Submit Activity 6.3 2. Launch Activity 6.5 Final submitted data from 6.3 appears in 6.5

testcases.description: Odd Observation – repeated attempt data not reflected
testcases.expected: Actual: Old data from first attempt remains
testcases.raw: TC_45 External CummalationNegative Odd Observation – repeated attempt data not reflected 1. Complete Activity 6.3 first time 2. Launch Activity 6.5 and note data 3. Relaunch Activity 6.3, change data, and submit again 4. Launch Activity 6.5 Expected: Updated data from 6.3 appears in 6.5. Actual: Old data from first attempt remains

testcases.description: Verify external cumulation behaviour on “In Progress” student1. Student starts 6.3 but hasn’t submitted
testcases.raw: TC_46 External CummalationPositive Verify external cumulation behaviour on “In Progress” student1. Student starts 6.3 but hasn’t submitted 2. Launch 6.5 Data from in-progress 6.3 appears in 6.5

testcases.description: Verify teacher view reflects external cumulation1. Complete 6.3
testcases.expected: 5Teacher sees correct cumulated data
testcases.raw: TC_47 External CummalationPositive Verify teacher view reflects external cumulation1. Complete 6.3 2. Teacher views report for 6.5Teacher sees correct cumulated data
